---
title: "Memory Subpart of BME 306 Study"
date: today
toc: true
autor: "Natallia Halai und Angela Textor"
format: 
  html:
    
    embed-resources: true
    number-sections: true
    code_fold: true
project:
  
  output_dir: output
  execute_dir: project
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: true
execute: 
  warning: false
  error: false
  freeze: true
---


```{r}

```




```{r}

```
